title: SWD club cricket fixtures: 7 and 8 February
description: CLUB CRICKET NEWS - The premier league...
bodyText: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"New Dawn Park will have the opportunity to move away from the bottom of the log when they take on George at Rooirivierrif."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"CLUB CRICKET NEWS - The premier league fixture between Sussex and Knysna Cavaliers at D’Almeida promises to be a mouthwatering clash this weekend.","html":"CLUB CRICKET NEWS - The premier league fixture between Sussex and Knysna Cavaliers at D’Almeida promises to be a mouthwatering clash this weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Pacaltsdorp, who is the top performer this season, will host Harlequins."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"New Dawn Park will have the opportunity to move away from the bottom of the log when they take on George at Rooirivierrif.","html":"New Dawn Park will have the opportunity to move away from the bottom of the log when they take on George at Rooirivierrif."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The semi-finals in the Reserve Division 1 and 2 competition are scheduled for the weekend.","html":"The semi-finals in the Reserve Division 1 and 2 competition are scheduled for the weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The complete list of fixtures is:","html":"The complete list of fixtures is:"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Saturday 7 February"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Premier League: Pacaltsdorp United vs Harlequins Forces; George vs New Dawn Park, Sussex vs Knysna Cavaliers; Union Stars II vs Union Stars I","html":" Premier League: Pacaltsdorp United vs Harlequins Forces; George vs New Dawn Park, Sussex vs Knysna Cavaliers; Union Stars II vs Union Stars I"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Promotion League: Plett Pioneers vs Ladismith; Mossel Bay vs George B; Heidelberg United vs Riversdale; Thembalethu vs Pirates United; Ramblers vs NMU Madibaz George","html":" Promotion League: Plett Pioneers vs Ladismith;
